title: Decoder output-projection producer-side weight-fetch wrapper contract
summary: Validate the producer-side control contract that issues output-projection tile weight requests into the full-bank resident weight-store interface.
motivation: The full-bank weight-store interface contract passed for the selected 37-bank and 50-bank resident-store points.
The next integration risk is the producer-side request cadence, response ordering, and outstanding-request throttling before any physical wrapper measurement.
A bounded RTL/perf-sim contract can expose control mismatches without instantiating the full resident SRAM arrays.

requested_items.objective: Probe producer-side tile request cadence, outstanding request throttling, full-bank masks, and response ordering for the resident output-projection weight-fetch wrapper.

expected_result.reason: If producer-side request/throttle behavior matches perf-sim, queue a measured bounded physical wrapper for control logic while keeping resident storage as macro/proxy.

success_criteria: The probe uses full selected bank counts from the weight-store feasibility artifact.
The cycle-level perf model and RTL simulation agree on accepted requests, responses, stalls, checksum, and final cycle.
The report separates control-contract evidence from full SRAM macro area or full GEMM datapath measurement.
non_goals: Do not instantiate full resident weight arrays as registers.
Do not claim SRAM bitcell or macro PPA from this control-contract job.
Do not replace the full-bank weight-store interface contract.
